details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: Four entrances, easy to access:1 Top loading, 2 large side entries, 1 front entrance.Your pet can poke her head out from the top loading.The Top opening with enlarged size is convenient to get in or out.This portable pet carrier is collapsible, just unzip all zippers,folds down flat for easy storage when not in use.

Large Cat Carrier Size: 19.5"L *12"W *12"H（50*31*31CM）,available for pets up to 20lbs (19"L*11"W*11"H).Do NOT select the carrier based on weight only.It is based on your pet’s measurements first, then make sure not to exceed the maximum weight limit (20lbs).Please measure your pet's size before acquisition.

Two sides expandable: The pet carrier bag can be extended on 2 sides，front and back, creates a comfortable extra room for your pets to move around, The front expansion can be opened as an entrance after unzipped.

Rugged frame to stay upright: Upgraded structural design of steel strand to make sure that the pet bag will not be out of shape or sagged when you are out with your cats/puppies. The top does not collapse due to the sturdy steel frame.

Well-ventilated: 3 large storage pockets with ventilated mesh,which is convenient to store pet food,treats, vet paperwork or outdoor supplies (documents/ snacks/toys/pads/sanitary bags/wipes/treats/catnip).Suitable for travel/vacation/leisure/hiking/home/pet house/pet clinic/airport/plane/car/outdoor activities etc.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality, comfortable for travel, and perfect for flights, with plenty of space and pockets. However, the size receives mixed feedback - while it's big enough for cats, it's too large to fit under airline seats. Moreover, the sturdiness and fit are also mixed aspects, with some finding it sturdy while others say it's not very sturdy, and while some say it fits just fine, others mention it doesn't fit in airplanes.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: ...with more space so she can be comfortable and I have got to say it’s very sturdy....
I like this bag very much and my cat accepted it with no issues. Good quality and comfortable to travel.
Great bag I have a French bulldog not a lot of room but just enough for a quick travel....
Great product! Perfect for airlines and good space for car rides, while still keeping my cat in a carrier so he’s more calm. Love it!...

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable for travel, with one mentioning that their cat goes straight into it without any fuss.

examples.snippet: ...It's kept him calm on the flight and he's able to stretch out and be comfortable. A must get!!!!
My dog LOVES this bag. It’s her comfort and hiding place. Perfect for the airplane and love the luggage handle pocket slip....
...It was very easy to assemble and very comfortable for the cat, but not good for air traveling purposes.
...thing is that when it expands she has enough space to move and get comfortable....

insights.title: Travel-friendly
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier excellent for travel, particularly for flights, with one customer mentioning it works well for overnight trips.

examples.snippet: This was a great travel carrier for my Minpin!. It was his first flight so we were both nervous....
...And they love the open sides. Great product - perfect for a trip to the vet.
Great product! Perfect for airlines and good space for car rides, while still keeping my cat in a carrier so he’s more calm. Love it!...
It’s sturdy enough and perfect for car rides. My pup sits comfortably in it. I love how it’s soft inside for her and that it can expand/fold up....

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier functional, with one mentioning that their cat accepted it with no issues.

examples.snippet: ...Luckily there were no bad lasting results, and it works well if you can assure that all of the zippers are properly closed.
...It was my first time traveling by plane with a pet but this carrier worked great!...
...Use this every day and works great!
...It worked perfectly as a "security blanket" for her throughout our trip. I haven't had her in it as a carrier yet. It is easy to set up and store....

insights.title: Space
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's spacious design with multiple pockets, and one customer notes that the extendable sides provide extra room.

examples.snippet: ...It has so much space both with and without the sides down (my cats only abt 7.5-8 lbs) and the material it’s made of feels so nice & high quality....

I liked how many zippers and pockets there are on this carrier....
...So much room for my 22 pound 5 month old puppy. It's kept him calm on the flight and he's able to stretch out and be comfortable....

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the size of the pet carrier: while some find it big enough for cats, others report it being too large for airline seats.

examples.snippet: Our 13 pound mini schnauzer does quite well in this. It's roomy and seems too big for under-the-seat flight rules, but the walls flex and compress...
Unfortunately, this bag is too big to fit under the seat for Delta.
I can't get my cat out of this carrier because it is so roomy and comfortable. I highly recommend .
Great, but was too small for my pup. Padding seems a little thin.

examples.snippet: ...more space so she can be comfortable and I have got to say it’s very sturdy....

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with how the pet carrier fits: while some say it accommodates their needs, others report that it doesn't fit in airplanes or under seats.

examples.snippet: ...Fit under the seat, expands by zipper on both sides, & easy to put together!
...This item is not as described and does not fit under the seat.
...My biggest cat is probably 14 lbs and she fits comfortably inside. They will come in handy for a big move from South FL to Indy soon....
...My dog really enjoy it, but I have to say that it didn’t fit in the airplane and is not flexible to adjust it. Also it is hard to fold it.

authors_reviews.title: Amazing!
authors_reviews.text: I was about to return this because I wasn't sure it was going to be a good fit for my 14& 1/2 lb cat. As I was taking it apart, I was noticing how well made the design was, so I decided to hold on to it. Had to bring my cat to the vet today and he was sooo calm in this carrier as opposed to the bigger, bulkier one I was using. This has comfortable straps, for shoulder and hands and it's not killing my back which is a plus!I love how the sides come out. I had both open, but closed the second one so he could lean against that side and look out facing me while in the vet office.He didn't even cry, which was amazing considering how loudly he protested the hard case. I think he like that he could feel me through the soft bag. This was a great purchase. Would recommend for a dog or cat 16lbs and under.
authors_reviews.author: candi

authors_reviews.title: This is an amazing carrier!!!
authors_reviews.text: My cat is terrified of carriers. I ordered this in hopes of having an easier time of taking him to the vet. My cat is 14 years old and I hate the trauma of shoving him into a crate to take him for checkups. As if the trip isn't hard enough already right? This was a wonderful experience! He went in super easy. With the mesh he didn't feel like something bad was going to happen. Even the car ride was so much more pleasant. The shoulder strap makes it so easy to carry, and it was great to open the sides in the car for his comfort. The zippers made it so much easier to reach in and pet him safely without worry of him getting loose. Also, that mesh is super strong/tough. He tried to claw and scratch and it didn't leave a mark! Also, the whole thing folds flat which I did not realize. Overall, I would recommend this to anyone with multiple small cats, or even a good size cat (mine is 13 pounds, and he had plenty of room). My vet was also very impressed and said she would recommend this to other people who have a smaller dog or cat(s) who don't like the traditional cages. So glad I found this!
authors_reviews.author: Justine F.

authors_reviews.title: Bella loves her new carrier/condo!
authors_reviews.text: My cat, Bella, loves this carrier. She actually doesn't know it's a carrier yet. She just loves to do inside it and take naps. I hope that will make it easier to use it as a carrier. One of the things I really love - and so does Bella - is that she can stretch out in it when the sides as expanded.
authors_reviews.author: Patsy426

authors_reviews.title: Plenty of room for 2 almost grown cats who are close siblings
authors_reviews.text: I'm giving it a 4 because it needed several days of off-gassing before I could stand to be around it or risk putting the cats in it.Comfort: the foam padding is pretty thin for the kitties, but the carrying straps are good for me.For sturdiness - I'm guessing it's fine - would have ranked at 5 if the bottom was more rigid. Re cloth sided carriers, I have heard of cats who got really scared and tore open the mesh. Hoping that doesn't happen w/ mine because I like the advantages of a cloth-sided carrier over a rigid one.Lots of room for my cats who love curling up next to and on each other. If the cats didn't love each other, it might be a little close? I'm happy w/ the size for my kitties (if you just have 1 regular sized kitty, I would get a smaller one). It was a 2 hr. trip from the rescue group to home and they had room to move around some on the trip.I like the multiple entries for and ways to access the cats. Hoping it will be easy for a vet to examine them in it. I also like the idea of the parts that expand so that if they have to hang out in it for awhile someday, they can have more space.I'm leaving it open in the house and they do use it as a place to ambush each other or to take a break sometimes, so I'm glad they feel comfortable in it.
authors_reviews.author: GL

authors_reviews.title: The Days of Having to Force the Cat in the Carrier Are Over🎉
authors_reviews.text: My 13-pound tuxedo cat is getting older and arthritis has become an issue. We had a hard-sided carrier that he just didn’t like and it didn’t open from the top, which would allow us to get him in and out more easily. After researching many carriers, I chose this one because it had the top opening and the fold-down sides, which would allow him to have more space when we were traveling in the car. When it arrived, I opened it completely, set it on the carpet in our tv room, sprinkled it with some catnip, and went about my business. Thirty minutes later I went back in the room and the cat is completely sprawled out in there, purring away, completely delighted with his new cozy space. We never put it away because he loves to play and nap in it (and I haven’t had to entice him with more catnip). Our vet loves it. The only question my husband had was that it doesn’t look small enough to fit under an airline seat, as the product description said, but we are not likely to need it for that. Love the handles and shoulder strap which make it much easier to carry than our previous carrier. We used the carrier on a two-hour car trip and had a mishap. He was determined to get out and pushed so hard that he broke the zipper of the front panel. I rezipped it, put him back in and he pushed it open immediately, meaning that the zipper is damaged and the carrier can’t be used for travel unless I sew that side shut. I worry that he could do it to another side. We were so surprised that he was able to do this and will have to go back to a hard carrier. So, warning, if you have an active pet that pushes at things, this might not be a good travel choice. It’s still a terrific cozy spot for him, though.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Excellent! It’s stylish and spacious
authors_reviews.text: Great product! Perfect for airlines and good space for car rides, while still keeping my cat in a carrier so he’s more calm. Love it! And not as ugly as some other products I’ve tried.
authors_reviews.author: David Hudson

authors_reviews.title: complicated
authors_reviews.text: I was driving my cats across the country when one of them (each had their own carrier) walked onto my lap. Somehow I had missed one of the many zippers, and he easily escaped. Luckily there were no bad lasting results, and it works well if you can assure that all of the zippers are properly closed.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon User

authors_reviews.title: No issues at the airport
authors_reviews.text: Used this to pick up a French Mastiff puppy that was around 19 pounds, yes big girl. It was very durable and fit under the front seat. I had no issue getting through TIA actually they wanted to play with the puppy go figure
authors_reviews.author: Scott

other_countries_reviews.title: Beautifully made & size
other_countries_reviews.text: Beautifully made...picked up my new British blue kitten ..extended sides for trip home on front seat so he could see me...was perfect!!Very happy 🐾🐾
other_countries_reviews.author: Bridget

other_countries_reviews.title: Purrrfect carrier
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfect for my 14 lbs cat! He loved it and went inside the second I started building it for him. Loved that it has collapsible sides. Looks very comfortable and he is enjoying it!
other_countries_reviews.author: Kevin Barrientos

other_countries_reviews.title: Très pratique
other_countries_reviews.text: Super utile! J'aime bien ce sac de transport. Par contre, si votre chat et un peu gros, ça va être un peu juste.
other_countries_reviews.author: La boîte en elle même est parfaite mais l'annonce dit bien"lot de 2 boites Faraday" avec pochettes. Après avoir pensé qu'il s'agissait d'une erreur, j'ai retourné la boîte mais à la réception de la deuxième commande, j'ai aussi reçu une seule boîte. 🙁Donc la boîte est bonne mais il s'agit tout de même d'une fausse représentation.

other_countries_reviews.title: Cat Carrier
other_countries_reviews.text: It has been used to transport both of my cats (not at the same time). It is great to have a shoulder strap as one of my cats is a Maine Coone cross and is fairly heavy. The fold down sides are helpful for ventilation and a more relaxing confinement.
other_countries_reviews.author: K. Wear

other_countries_reviews.title: Cat loves it
other_countries_reviews.text: Works great! Held up to my large cat! Still have it and works good
other_countries_reviews.author: Rachael Sales
